entries.title: soli graph build
entries.description: Extract a graph of your project's source (files, classes, models, controllers, methods, routes, views and their relationships) into SolidB so agents retrieve code by semantic search and graph traversal — graph RAG over your own codebase. Use --no-embed for a structural offline graph, or --dry-run to print JSON.

Pipeline operator for chaining function calls
Addition operator. Also concatenates strings (with auto-conversion of non-string operands).
Subtraction operator.
Multiplication operator.
Division operator. Returns a Float when dividing integers.
Modulo operator. Returns the remainder of a division.
Equality comparison. Returns true when both operands are equal.
Inequality comparison. Returns true when the operands differ.
Less-than comparison.
Less-than-or-equal comparison.
Greater-than comparison.
Greater-than-or-equal comparison.
Logical AND. Returns true when both operands are truthy. Short-circuits when the left operand is falsy.
Logical OR. Returns true when at least one operand is truthy. Short-circuits when the left operand is truthy.
Logical NOT. Negates a boolean expression.
Null coalescing operator. Returns the right-hand value when the left-hand side is null.
Safe navigation operator. Accesses a property or calls a method only when the receiver is not null; otherwise returns null.
Range operator. Creates an array of integers from start to end (exclusive).
Add and assign. Equivalent to a = a + b. Also concatenates strings.
Subtract and assign. Equivalent to a = a - b.
Multiply and assign. Equivalent to a = a * b.
Divide and assign. Equivalent to a = a / b.
Modulo and assign. Equivalent to a = a % b.
Conditional assignment. Assigns b to a only when a is currently falsy (null or false). Right-hand side is not evaluated when skipped.
Conditional assignment. Assigns b to a only when a is currently truthy. Right-hand side is not evaluated when skipped.
Nullish conditional assignment. Assigns b to a only when a is currently null. Preserves false and 0.
Postfix increment. Increases a variable by 1 and returns the value before incrementing.
Postfix decrement. Decreases a variable by 1 and returns the value before decrementing.

entries.title: pdf_facturx
entries.description: Render a PDF/A-3b Factur-X (EN 16931) electronic invoice, embedding the caller-provided Cross-Industry-Invoice (CII) XML. Returns base64.

entries.title: pdf_facturx_from_invoice
entries.description: Render a Factur-X PDF/A-3b from a typed invoice document — generates the CII XML and computes totals and the VAT breakdown from the line items.

entries.title: pdf_from_markdown
entries.description: Render a designed PDF straight from a Markdown string — headings, lists, tables, code, blockquotes and links map onto the layout engine. Returns base64.

entries.title: pdf_fill
entries.description: Fill an existing PDF's AcroForm fields (text, checkboxes, radios) from a data hash; optionally flatten to bake the values in and lock the fields. Returns base64.

entries.title: pdf_merge
entries.description: Merge several PDFs (each a path or base64 bytes) into one document, in order. Returns base64.

entries.title: pdf_pages
entries.description: Keep a subset of pages from a PDF — a range string like "1-3,7" or an array [1,3,7] (1-based). Returns base64.

entries.title: pdf_stamp
entries.description: Stamp text — a label or diagonal watermark (DRAFT, PAID, CONFIDENTIAL) — onto an existing PDF's pages. Returns base64.

entries.title: pdf_extract_facturx
entries.description: Read the embedded Factur-X / ZUGFeRD / XRechnung invoice XML out of a received PDF. Returns the XML string, or null when there is none.

entries.title: pdf_attachments
entries.description: List every embedded file in a PDF as { name, mime, size, base64 }. Reads the EmbeddedFiles name tree, falling back to AF.

entries.title: pdf_sign
entries.description: Digitally sign an existing PDF (path or base64) with a PAdES CMS signature — the standalone sibling of the sign render option. Options: cert, key, chain, reason, tsa, appearance. Returns base64.

entries.title: pdf_verify
entries.description: Verify the digital signatures in a PDF. Returns an array of { field, valid, covers_document, signer, reason, signed_at } — valid means the CMS verifies and the ByteRange digest matches (authentic + unmodified).

entries.title: PDF SVG images
entries.description: Embed SVG logos and icons in a PDF — the image element auto-detects and rasterises SVG so vector art stays crisp at any size.

entries.title: PDF password protection (encryption)

entries.title: PDF multi-column flow

entries.title: PDF background image
entries.description: options.backgroundImage draws a full-page image (cover photo, branded page) behind every page, with a pages filter.

entries.title: PDF table footer row & cell valign
entries.description: footer_columns closes a table and repeats above every page break (carried-forward subtotals); valign positions cell content top/middle/bottom.

entries.title: PDF file attachments
entries.description: Embed arbitrary files (CSV/XML/JSON sources) into the PDF's attachments panel via the attachments render option; composes with Factur-X.

entries.title: PDF justified text & keep-together
entries.description: alignment: justify distributes word gaps (last line left); minSpaceBelow keeps headings from being orphaned at a page bottom.

entries.title: PDF nested bookmarks (outline tree)
entries.description: bookmarkLevel nests outline entries under the last shallower one — hierarchical sidebar navigation like heading levels.

entries.title: pdf_response
entries.description: Render a PDF and return a ready application/pdf HTTP response (binary body via body_base64) straight from a controller.

entries.title: PDF TOC page numbers (#PAGE_OF:)
entries.description: #PAGE_OF:anchor# resolves to the page number of an anchored paragraph — clickable tables of contents with real page numbers.

entries.title: PDF line height, spacing & image fit
entries.description: Paragraph lineHeight multiplier and spacing (gap below the block), plus image height/contain-fit sizing.

entries.title: PDF table zebra striping, cell fill & colspan
entries.description: Zebra-stripe table rows (options.stripe), fill individual cells (fill), and merge cells across columns (colspan) for totals/summary rows.

entries.title: PDF letterhead (stationery underlay)

entries.title: PDF page_break element
entries.description: Force a new page in the PDF content flow with { "type": "page_break" } — replaces the move-y overflow trick.

entries.title: PDF underline & strikethrough
entries.description: Underline or strike text in a PDF: underline/strike on paragraph options or per span (stroke follows the text color).

entries.title: PDF page numbers in header & body
entries.description: #PAGE# / #TOTAL_PAGE# tokens now resolve in header and body paragraphs too (not just the footer); headers also interpolate ${...} data.

entries.title: PDF document metadata
entries.description: Set title/author/subject on plain pdf_render output (PDF Info dictionary), not just Factur-X.

entries.title: PDF barcode element
entries.description: Render a 1D barcode (Code 128, EAN-13, EAN-8, Code 39) in a PDF, with an optional human-readable caption.

entries.title: PDF list element
entries.description: Bulleted or numbered lists in a PDF, with nested sublists and inline rich-text items.

entries.title: PDF chart element
entries.description: Bar, line, and pie charts in a PDF, drawn from data-bound or inline points — single- or multi-series (grouped/stacked bars, multi-line), with legends and value-axis gridlines.

entries.title: PDF text color & page background
entries.description: Color a whole paragraph with options.color (hex, no #), and paint a page background with options.background. Inline SVG data-URI colors accept literal # or %23.

entries.title: PDF control flow (repeat / if / unless)
entries.description: Data-driven PDF templates: repeat a block of elements once per array item (with scoped ${field}), and conditionally render blocks with if/unless (truthiness or string equals, optional else).

entries.title: Markdown.to_spans
entries.description: Parse inline markdown (bold/italic/code/link) into a PDF paragraph's spans array.

entries.title: Tagged / accessible PDF
entries.description: Emit a tagged (accessible) PDF: StructTreeRoot, MarkInfo, ParentTree, per-page StructParents, /Tabs /S and document /Lang for screen readers. Structural PDF/UA baseline; incompatible with Factur-X.

entries.title: PDF/A archival output (pdfa option)
entries.description: Emit PDF/A-3b archival output without a Factur-X payload: sRGB OutputIntent, XMP pdfaid metadata, PDF 1.7. For legal-archiving mandates on non-invoice documents; incompatible with password protection and tagged templates.

entries.title: PDF invoice discounts, charges & payment terms
entries.description: Typed invoice allowances (BG-20 discounts), charges (BG-21 shipping/fees, fixed or percent), payment_terms (BT-20) and credit notes (type_code 381) — computed into the VAT breakdown and the CII XML; exposed to templates as discounts[]/charges[] and total.discount/charges/taxable.

entries.title: PDF header/footer data binding & elements
entries.description: Data-bound elements (table, repeat, chart) work in the header band; the footer band supports hr, image, rect, line, ellipse and move alongside paragraphs. Page tokens gain the #PAGES# alias, charts a true donut kind, and justify works on spans paragraphs.

entries.title: Encrypted & protected bundles
entries.description: Encrypt a .soli bundle with AES-256-GCM (soli build --encrypt) and fetch the decryption key at boot from a key server (SOLI_BUNDLE_AUTH_URL + SOLI_BUNDLE_API_KEY) so revoking it is a kill-switch. --protect additionally ships compiled binary ASTs instead of readable source. Decrypted files live in RAM-backed /dev/shm (0700), removed on shutdown.

entries.title: Standalone executables

entries.title: group_by (array form)
entries.description: Group on one or more fields; combine with aggregate(spec), or alone for an implicit count per group (n). Legacy 3-arg group_by(field, func, agg_field) is unchanged.

entries.title: median
entries.description: Median aggregation terminal — like sum/avg, chain .first. p50 only: SolidB has no PERCENTILE function.

entries.title: stddev
entries.description: Standard-deviation aggregation terminal — chain .first.

entries.title: variance
entries.description: Variance aggregation terminal — chain .first.

entries.title: count_distinct
entries.description: Count of distinct values of a field — aggregation terminal, chain .first; also available as an aggregate() func and a columnar aggregate op.

entries.title: columnar
entries.description: Declare a columnar-store model — a separate column-oriented engine (own HTTP API, no document CRUD, no SDBQL FOR). Compression lz4 (default) or none.

entries.title: column
entries.description: Declare a typed column on a columnar model (int/float/string/bool/timestamp/json families; nullable:, indexed:).

entries.title: insert_rows
entries.description: Batch append rows to a columnar store; returns { "inserted": n, "ids": [...] }. Auto-creates the store in dev.

entries.title: query (columnar)
entries.description: Fetch rows from a columnar store: column projection, at most one filter (eq/ne/gt/gte/lt/lte/in), limit — no sort.

entries.title: add_column_index
entries.description: Create a column index on a columnar store: sorted (default), hash, bitmap, minmax, or bloom.

entries.title: column_indexes
entries.description: List the column indexes of a columnar store; drop_column_index(field) removes one.

entries.title: columnar_stats
entries.description: Store-level statistics for a columnar model.

entries.title: vector_index
entries.description: Declare an HNSW vector index on an embedding field — similar() then pushes down to ANN search. Optional m:, ef_construction:, quantization:, name:.

entries.title: fulltext_index
entries.description: Declare a fulltext index over one or more fields; powers Model.search with ranking, fuzzy matching, and highlighting.

entries.title: geo_index
entries.description: Declare a geospatial index on a { lat, lon } field; powers near / within queries.

entries.title: index
entries.description: Declare a secondary index in the model body (field or array; unique:, type: persistent default / hash / fulltext / bloom / cuckoo, name:). Synced at dev boot or via soli db:indexes.

entries.title: search
entries.description: Fulltext search over a declared fulltext_index — eager, ranked results with _search_score; distance for fuzzy, highlight adds _highlighted.

entries.title: near
entries.description: Geo search sorted by distance (requires geo_index); each result carries _distance in meters. Eager — no chaining.

entries.title: within
entries.description: Geo search returning everything inside a radius in meters (requires geo_index). Eager — no chaining.

entries.title: soli db:indexes
entries.description: CLI reconciler: create any missing indexes declared with the model index DSL (index / vector_index / fulltext_index / geo_index). Dev creates them at boot; migrations remain the recommended production DDL path.

entries.title: _search_score
entries.description: Relevance score attached to each Model.search fulltext result.

entries.title: _distance
entries.description: Distance in meters attached to each Model.near geo result.

entries.title: _similarity_score
entries.description: Similarity score attached to each .similar() vector-search result (ANN via a declared vector_index, or the client-side cosine path).

entries.title: Forms & CSRF Protection
entries.description: Rails-style form builder: form_with, field helpers, validation errors, button_to, method override, per-session CSRF tokens.

entries.title: form_with
entries.description: Build a form for a record: derives URL and verb, prefills values, embeds the CSRF token and _method override.

entries.title: csrf_token
entries.description: Per-session CSRF token, created on first use; verified server-side when sent as _csrf_token or X-CSRF-Token.

entries.title: button_to
entries.description: One-button form for state-changing links: method override, CSRF token, and optional JS confirm built in.

entries.title: cors
entries.description: Built-in CORS: declare cross-origin access per path — preflights answered before routing, allow headers on every response, origin-checked CSRF opt-in.

entries.title: permit
entries.description: Strong parameters for documents: whitelist-filter a (nested) params hash — scalars, arrays, nested shapes; everything else is dropped.

entries.title: fields_for
entries.description: Nested form sub-builder: fields render as author[name] and prefill from the nested document; the server nests them back into params.

entries.title: paginate
entries.description: Render pagination navigation (prev/next, page numbers) from the result of Model.paginate() or a query builder. Supports path, param, window size, and extra classes.

entries.title: component
entries.description: Render a reusable component partial from app/views/components/<name>.html.slv (or with explicit path). Lightweight view composition helper.

entries.title: Nested Parameters
entries.description: Bracket keys nest Rack-style: author[name], tags[], items[][sku] — form, multipart, and query params alike; filter with permit().

entries.title: POP3
entries.description: Read email over POP3(S): connect, list, fetch and parse messages into structured hashes.

entries.title: Pop3.new
entries.description: Connect and authenticate to a POP3 server (implicit TLS on port 995 by default).

entries.title: pop3.stat
entries.description: Message count and total size of the mailbox.

entries.title: pop3.list
entries.description: Per-message id and size list.

entries.title: pop3.fetch
entries.description: Fetch and parse one message into a structured hash.

entries.title: pop3.fetch_all
entries.description: Fetch and parse all messages (capped by SOLI_POP3_MAX_MESSAGES).

entries.title: pop3.delete
entries.description: Mark a message for deletion (applied on quit).

entries.title: pop3.quit
entries.description: Commit deletions and close the connection.

entries.title: IMAP
entries.description: Read email over IMAP4rev1: select a mailbox, search and fetch server-side, with structured message parsing.

entries.title: Imap.new
entries.description: Connect and authenticate to an IMAP server (implicit TLS on port 993 by default).

entries.title: imap.select
entries.description: Select a mailbox and return its status (exists, recent, unseen, uidvalidity, uidnext, flags).

entries.title: imap.mailboxes
entries.description: List all mailboxes/folders with their delimiter and flags.

entries.title: imap.search
entries.description: Return sequence numbers matching an IMAP search key (UNSEEN, FROM, SINCE, ...).

entries.title: imap.uid_search
entries.description: Return UIDs matching an IMAP search key.

entries.title: imap.fetch
entries.description: Fetch and parse a message by sequence number (does not set \Seen).

entries.title: imap.fetch_uid
entries.description: Fetch and parse a message by UID (does not set \Seen).

entries.title: imap.fetch_all
entries.description: Fetch all messages in the selected mailbox (capped by SOLI_IMAP_MAX_MESSAGES).

entries.title: imap.mark_seen
entries.description: Add the \Seen flag (mark as read); mark_unseen removes it.

entries.title: imap.delete
entries.description: Mark a message \Deleted (removed on expunge).

entries.title: imap.expunge
entries.description: Permanently remove \Deleted messages.

entries.title: imap.copy
entries.description: Copy a message into another mailbox.

entries.title: imap.move
entries.description: Move a message to another mailbox (RFC 6851 MOVE).

entries.title: imap.logout
entries.description: Close the connection.

entries.title: embed
entries.description: Generate an embedding vector for text via an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (SOLI_EMBEDDING_API_KEY / SOLI_EMBEDDING_URL / SOLI_EMBEDDING_MODEL).

entries.title: embed_batch
entries.description: Generate embedding vectors for an array of texts in one request.

entries.title: llm_generate
entries.description: Generate a chat completion from a system + user prompt via an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (SOLI_LLM_API_KEY / SOLI_LLM_URL / SOLI_LLM_MODEL).

entries.title: out.llm_stream
entries.description: Inside an sse block, stream an LLM completion token-by-token to the client and return the full answer to persist.

entries.title: Model.rag
entries.description: One-call retrieval-augmented generation: embed the question, ANN-search the vector_index for the top-k rows, build an LLM context, and return { answer, sources }.

entries.title: Model.graph_rag
entries.description: Graph-augmented retrieval: seed with ANN on the vector_index, expand each hit through an edge model, then re-rank the union.

entries.title: Model.live_where
entries.description: Reactive live query: runs like where(filter).all() and subscribes the current LiveView, so a later matching write re-renders it automatically (per-row matching; diff gate drops empty frames).

entries.title: broadcast
entries.description: Fan a payload out to every WebSocket connection in a channel and every SSE subscriber of the topic of the same name; returns the SSE subscriber count.

entries.title: Model.broadcast
entries.description: Publish a payload to the model's collection channel over WebSocket and SSE — a shortcut for broadcast() in an after_save callback.

entries.title: PAGERANK
entries.description: Computes PageRank over an edge collection graph. Returns sorted array of { node, score } objects. Supports damping and iteration options.

entries.title: DEGREE_CENTRALITY
entries.description: Returns the degree (number of incident edges) for each node in an edge collection. Useful for simple centrality.

entries.title: rerank
entries.description: Reorder an array of retrieved records by query-token overlap (client-side, offline). Options: field, limit. A cheap second pass after similar / hybrid / graph_rag.

entries.title: Reranking
entries.description: Reorder retrieved rows by query-token overlap; raw SDBQL RERANK adds an LLM mode.

entries.title: Auto-embeddings (embedding_source)
entries.description: Let SolidB embed inserted text server-side on a background worker (off the write path) instead of a client-side before_save embed hook.

entries.title: VECTOR_SEARCH
entries.signature: VECTOR_SEARCH(coll, index, vec, k, { filter, overfetch })
entries.description: Raw SDBQL k-NN search with a server-side metadata filter applied after ANN candidate selection. Returns { doc, score } rows.

entries.title: RAG_PIPELINE
entries.description: Raw SDBQL: run a stored retrieve→expand→rerank pipeline defined in _rag_pipelines.

entries.title: DOC_AS_OF
entries.description: Raw SDBQL time-travel: read a document as it was at a past time (epoch millis or RFC3339). Requires versioning enabled on the collection.

entries.title: DOC_HISTORY
entries.description: Raw SDBQL: full version history of a document, newest first (ts, deleted, value). Requires versioning enabled.
